questions.question: What is the Open Handset Alliance?
options: A) A company that develops Android OS
B) A consortium of companies that develops Android OS
C) A project to create a new mobile operating system
D) A software company that develops mobile apps
questions.explanation: The Open Handset Alliance (OHA) is a consortium of companies that develops the Android operating system.

questions.question: Which of the following is not one of the key principles of Android?
options: A) Simplicity
B) Customization
C) Interoperability
D) Monopoly
questions.explanation: The key principles of Android include simplicity, customization, and interoperability, but not monopoly.

questions.question: What is the Merger of Two Companies (MOC) in Android?
options: A) Merging of One Company into Another
B) Merger of Two Companies to Create One Company
C) Merging of Two Companies to Create Android OS
D) Merger of Two Companies to Create Open Handset Alliance
questions.explanation: The Merger of Two Companies (MOC) in Android was a merger of HTC and Google to create the Android operating system.

questions.question: What is the main goal of the Android Open Handset Alliance?
options: A) To dominate the mobile phone market
B) To create an open-source mobile operating system
C) To create a proprietary mobile operating system
D) To create a hybrid mobile operating system
questions.explanation: The main goal of the Android Open Handset Alliance is to create an open-source mobile operating system.

questions.question: What is the primary interface through which users interact with the Android OS?
options: A) Android Studio
B) Android SDK
C) Android emulator
D) Graphical User Interface (GUI)
questions.explanation: The primary interface through which users interact with the Android OS is the Graphical User Interface (GUI).
